Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*******************************************************************************************

 Preservation of isomorphic functors

 In this file, we show that two functors that are equivalent in the arrow bicategory, share
 the same preservation properties regarding finite limits. More specifically, we show two
 statements.

 First, we show that whenever we have a natural isomorphism from `F` to `G`, then `G`
 preserves terminal objects/binary products/equalizers whenever `F` does. Using this, we show
 that whenever a functor `G : D₁ ⟶ D₂` is equivalent to some functor `F : C₁ ⟶ C₂` in the
 arrow bicategory, then `G` preserves terminal objects/binary products/equalizers if `F` does.
 An equivalence between `F` and `G` in the arrow bicategory amounts to adjoint equivalences
 `C₁ ≃ D₁` and `C₂ ≃ D₂` such that the resulting square commutes.

 We also compare preservation of pullbacks and preservation of products and equalizers.

 Contents
 1. Preservation and natural isomorphisms
 2. Preservation and equivalences in the arrow bicategory
 3. Preservation of binary products and equalizers from pullbacks
 4. Preservation of pullbacks via binary products and equalizers

 *******************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.PullbackConstructions.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.EquivalencePreservation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.LimitIso.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.CompositesAndInverses.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * 1. Preservation and natural isomorphisms *)
Section PreservationNatIso.
  Context {C D : category}
          {F G : C ⟶ D}
          (τ : nat_z_iso F G).

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal G

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal G

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_terminal F
x: C
Hx: isTerminal C x
isTerminal D (G x)

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_terminal F
x: C
Hx: isTerminal C x
z_iso (make_Terminal (F x) (HF x Hx)) (G x)

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_terminal F
x: C
Hx: isTerminal C x
z_iso (F x) (G x)

    exact (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
preserves_binproduct G

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
preserves_binproduct G

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
isBinProduct D (G x) (G y) (G p) (# G π₁) (# G π₂)

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
prod:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂) (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
isBinProduct D (G x) (G y) (G p) (# G π₁) (# G π₂)

F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
prod:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂) (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)

C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
prod:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂) 
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)

C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
prod:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂) 
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
z_iso (G p) (BinProduct_z_iso_lr prod ?l ?r)
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
prod:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂) 
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
# G π₁ =
?f · BinProductPr1 D (BinProduct_z_iso_lr prod ?l ?r)
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
prod:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂) 
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
# G π₂ =
?f · BinProductPr2 D (BinProduct_z_iso_lr prod ?l ?r)

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
prod:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂) (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
z_iso (G x) (F x)
 exact (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x)).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
prod:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂) (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
z_iso (G y) (F y)
 exact (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y)).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
prod:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂) (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
z_iso (G p)
  (BinProduct_z_iso_lr prod
     (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x))
     (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y)))
 exact (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ p)).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
prod:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂) (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
# G π₁ =
z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ p)
· BinProductPr1 D
    (BinProduct_z_iso_lr prod
       (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x))
       (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y)))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite nat_trans_ax ;
         refine (!(id_left _) @ !_) ;
         rewrite !assoc ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H: isBinProduct C x y p π₁ π₂
prod:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂) (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
# G π₂ =
z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ p)
· BinProductPr2 D
    (BinProduct_z_iso_lr prod
       (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x))
       (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y)))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite nat_trans_ax ;
         refine (!(id_left _) @ !_) ;
         rewrite !assoc ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv).
  Defined.

      abstract

isEqualizer (# G f) (# G g) (# G h) Fp

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D

HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y, e: C

q: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g

z_iso (G x) (F x)

?l · # F f = # G f · ?r

C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y, e: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # G h · # G f = # G h · # G g
H: isEqualizer f g h p
q: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
eq:= make_Equalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) q
  (HF x y e f g h p q H): Equalizer (# F f) (# F g)
z_iso (G e) (Equalizer_z_iso_lr eq ?l ?r ?p ?q)
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y, e: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # G h · # G f = # G h · # G g
H: isEqualizer f g h p
q: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
eq:= make_Equalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) q
  (HF x y e f g h p q H): Equalizer (# F f) (# F g)
# G h =
?h
· EqualizerArrow (Equalizer_z_iso_lr eq ?l ?r ?p ?q)

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y, e: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # G h · # G f = # G h · # G g

q: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
eq:= make_Equalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) q
  (HF x y e f g h p q H): Equalizer (# F f) (# F g)
z_iso (G x) (F x)
 exact (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x)).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y, e: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # G h · # G f = # G h · # G g

eq:= make_Equalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) q

z_iso (G y) (F y)
 exact (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y)).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y, e: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # G h · # G f = # G h · # G g
H: isEqualizer f g h p
q: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
eq:= make_Equalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) q
  (HF x y e f g h p q H): Equalizer (# F f) (# F g)
z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x) · # F f =
# G f · z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         use z_iso_inv_on_left ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         cbn ;
         refine (!_) ;
         use z_iso_inv_on_right ;
         apply nat_trans_ax).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y, e: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # G h · # G f = # G h · # G g
H: isEqualizer f g h p
q: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
eq:= make_Equalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) q
  (HF x y e f g h p q H): Equalizer (# F f) (# F g)
z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x) · # F g =
# G g · z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         use z_iso_inv_on_left ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         cbn ;
         refine (!_) ;
         use z_iso_inv_on_right ;
         apply nat_trans_ax).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y, e: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # G h · # G f = # G h · # G g
H: isEqualizer f g h p
q: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
eq:= make_Equalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) q
  (HF x y e f g h p q H): Equalizer (# F f) (# F g)
z_iso (G e)
  (Equalizer_z_iso_lr eq
     (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x))
     (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y))
     (preserves_equalizer_nat_z_iso_f_subproof0 x y f)
     (preserves_equalizer_nat_z_iso_f_subproof1 x y g))
 exact (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ e)).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_equalizer F
x, y, e: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, x ⟧
p: h · f = h · g
Fp: # G h · # G f = # G h · # G g
H: isEqualizer f g h p
q: # F h · # F f = # F h · # F g
eq:= make_Equalizer (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) q
  (HF x y e f g h p q H): Equalizer (# F f) (# F g)
# G h =
z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ e)
· EqualizerArrow
    (Equalizer_z_iso_lr eq
       (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x))
       (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y))
       (preserves_equalizer_nat_z_iso_f_subproof0 x y
          f)
       (preserves_equalizer_nat_z_iso_f_subproof1 x y
          g))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite nat_trans_ax ;
         refine (!(id_left _) @ !_) ;
         rewrite !assoc ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_initial F
preserves_initial G

  
C, D: category

preserves_initial G

F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G

x: C
Hx: isInitial C x
isInitial D (G x)

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_initial F
x: C
Hx: isInitial C x
z_iso (make_Initial (F x) (HF x Hx)) (G x)

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_initial F
x: C
Hx: isInitial C x
z_iso (F x) (G x)

    exact (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x).
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
preserves_bincoproduct G

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
preserves_bincoproduct G

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
isBinCoproduct D (G x) (G y) (G p) (# G π₁) (# G π₂)

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinCoproduct (F x) (F y)
isBinCoproduct D (G x) (G y) (G p) (# G π₁) (# G π₂)

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinCoproduct (F x) (F y)
z_iso (F x) (G x)
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinCoproduct (F x) (F y)
z_iso (F y) (G y)
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinCoproduct (F x) (F y)
z_iso (BinCoproduct_z_iso_lr coprod ?l ?r) (G p)
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinCoproduct (F x) (F y)
# G π₁ =
BinCoproductIn1 (BinCoproduct_z_iso_lr coprod ?l ?r)
· ?f
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinCoproduct (F x) (F y)
# G π₂ =
BinCoproductIn2 (BinCoproduct_z_iso_lr coprod ?l ?r)
· ?f

    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinCoproduct (F x) (F y)
z_iso (F x) (G x)
 exact (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinCoproduct (F x) (F y)
z_iso (F y) (G y)
 exact (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinCoproduct (F x) (F y)
z_iso
  (BinCoproduct_z_iso_lr coprod
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x)
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y)) (G p)
 exact (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ p).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinCoproduct (F x) (F y)
# G π₁ =
BinCoproductIn1
  (BinCoproduct_z_iso_lr coprod
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x)
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y))
· nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ p
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         rewrite nat_trans_ax ;
         refine (!(id_left _) @ !_) ;
         rewrite !assoc ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv).
    
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
x, y, p: C
π₁: C ⟦ x, p ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ y, p ⟧
H: isBinCoproduct C x y p π₁ π₂
coprod:= make_BinCoproduct D (F x) 
  (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)
  (HF x y p π₁ π₂ H): BinCoproduct (F x) (F y)
# G π₂ =
BinCoproductIn2
  (BinCoproduct_z_iso_lr coprod
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ x)
     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ y))
· nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ p
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         rewrite nat_trans_ax ;
         refine (!(id_left _) @ !_) ;
         rewrite !assoc ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv).
  Defined.
End PreservationNatIso.


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_terminal G
preserves_terminal F


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_terminal G
preserves_terminal F

  exact (preserves_terminal_nat_z_iso_f (nat_z_iso_inv τ) HF).
Defined.


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct G
preserves_binproduct F


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_binproduct G
preserves_binproduct F

  exact (preserves_binproduct_nat_z_iso_f (nat_z_iso_inv τ) HF).
Defined.


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_equalizer G
preserves_equalizer F


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_equalizer G
preserves_equalizer F

  exact (preserves_equalizer_nat_z_iso_f (nat_z_iso_inv τ) HF).
Defined.


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_initial G
preserves_initial F


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_initial G
preserves_initial F

  exact (preserves_initial_nat_z_iso_f (nat_z_iso_inv τ) HF).
Defined.


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct G
preserves_bincoproduct F


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
τ: nat_z_iso F G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct G
preserves_bincoproduct F

  exact (preserves_bincoproduct_nat_z_iso_f (nat_z_iso_inv τ) HF).
Defined.

(** *  2. Preservation and equivalences in the arrow bicategory *)
Section EquivalencePreservation.
  Context {C₁ C₂ D₁ D₂ : category}
          (EC : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          (ED : D₁ ⟶ D₂)
          (HEC : adj_equivalence_of_cats EC)
          (HED : adj_equivalence_of_cats ED)
          (F : C₁ ⟶ D₁)
          (G : C₂ ⟶ D₂)
          (τ : nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)).

  Let R : C₂ ⟶ C₁ := right_adjoint HEC.

  Let θ : nat_z_iso (R ∙ F ∙ ED) G
    := nat_z_iso_comp
         (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
         (post_whisker_nat_z_iso (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HEC) G).

  
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal G

  
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal G

    
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED)

    
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal (R ∙ F)
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal ED

    
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal (R ∙ F)
 
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal R
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal F

      
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal R
 exact (right_adjoint_preserves_terminal _ HEC).
      
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal F
 exact HF.
    
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_terminal F
preserves_terminal ED
 exact (right_adjoint_preserves_terminal _ (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HED)).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
preserves_binproduct G

  
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
preserves_binproduct G

    
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
preserves_binproduct ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED)

    
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
preserves_binproduct (R ∙ F)
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
preserves_binproduct ED

    
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_binproduct F
preserves_binproduct (R ∙ F)
 
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G

EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
preserves_bincoproduct R
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
preserves_bincoproduct F

      
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
preserves_bincoproduct R
 exact (left_adjoint_preserves_bincoproduct _ (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HEC)).
      
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
preserves_bincoproduct F
 exact HF.
    
C₁, C₂, D₁, D₂: category
EC: C₁ ⟶ C₂
ED: D₁ ⟶ D₂
HEC: adj_equivalence_of_cats EC
HED: adj_equivalence_of_cats ED
F: C₁ ⟶ D₁
G: C₂ ⟶ D₂
τ: nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)
R:= right_adjoint HEC: C₂ ⟶ C₁
θ:= nat_z_iso_comp (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso R τ)
  (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
     (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
        HEC) G): nat_z_iso ((R ∙ F) ∙ ED) G
HF: preserves_bincoproduct F
preserves_bincoproduct ED
 exact (left_adjoint_preserves_bincoproduct _ HED).
  Defined.
End EquivalencePreservation.

Section EquivalencePreservation.
  Context {C₁ C₂ D₁ D₂ : category}
          (EC : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
          (ED : D₁ ⟶ D₂)
          (HEC : adj_equivalence_of_cats EC)
          (HED : adj_equivalence_of_cats ED)
          (F : C₁ ⟶ D₁)
          (G : C₂ ⟶ D₂)
          (τ : nat_z_iso (F ∙ ED) (EC ∙ G)).

  Let RC : C₂ ⟶ C₁ := right_adjoint HEC.
  Let RD : D₂ ⟶ D₁ := right_adjoint HED.

  Let θ : nat_z_iso (G ∙ RD) (RC ∙ F)
    := nat_z_iso_comp
         (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_inv
               (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HEC))
            (G ∙ RD))
         (nat_z_iso_comp
            (post_whisker_nat_z_iso
               (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso
                  RC
                  (nat_z_iso_inv τ))
               RD)
            (pre_whisker_nat_z_iso
               (RC ∙ F)
               (nat_z_iso_inv (unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HED)))).

  Definition preserves_terminal_equivalence_b
             (HG : preserves_terminal G)
    : preserves_terminal F
    := preserves_terminal_equivalence_f
         _ _
         (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HEC)
         (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HED)
         _ _
         θ
         HG.

  Definition preserves_binproduct_equivalence_b
             (HG : preserves_binproduct G)
    : preserves_binproduct F
    := preserves_binproduct_equivalence_f
         _ _
         (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HEC)
         (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HED)
         _ _
         θ
         HG.

  Definition preserves_equalizer_equivalence_b
             (HG : preserves_equalizer G)
    : preserves_equalizer F
    := preserves_equalizer_equivalence_f
         _ _
         (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HEC)
         (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HED)
         _ _
         θ
         HG.

  Definition preserves_initial_equivalence_b
             (HG : preserves_initial G)
    : preserves_initial F
    := preserves_initial_equivalence_f
         _ _
         (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HEC)
         (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HED)
         _ _
         θ
         HG.

  Definition preserves_bincoproduct_equivalence_b
             (HG : preserves_bincoproduct G)
    : preserves_bincoproduct F
    := preserves_bincoproduct_equivalence_f
         _ _
         (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HEC)
         (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv HED)
         _ _
         θ
         HG.
End EquivalencePreservation.

(** * 3. Preservation of binary products and equalizers from pullbacks *)
Section BinProductEqualizerPreservation.
  Context {C D : category}
          (F : C ⟶ D)
          (TC : Terminal C)
          (PBC : Pullbacks C)
          (HF₁ : preserves_pullback F)
          (HF₂ : preserves_terminal F).

  Let prodC : BinProducts C := BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC.

  Section PreservesProd.
    Context (x y : C).

    Let p : BinProduct C x y := prodC x y.
    Let π₁ : p --> x := BinProductPr1 _ p.
    Let π₂ : p --> y := BinProductPr2 _ p.
    Let H : isPullback
              (PullbackSqrCommutes
                 (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x) (TerminalArrow TC y)))
      := isPullback_Pullback (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow _ _) (TerminalArrow _ _)).

    Section UMP.
      Context {w : D}
              (f : w --> F x)
              (g : w --> F y).

      Let FT : Terminal D
        := make_Terminal _ (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)).

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
# F π₁ · # F (TerminalArrow TC x) =
# F π₂ · # F (TerminalArrow TC y)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
# F π₁ · # F (TerminalArrow TC x) =
# F π₂ · # F (TerminalArrow TC y)

F: C ⟶ D

PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
# F (π₁ · TerminalArrow TC x) =
# F (π₂ · TerminalArrow TC y)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
π₁ · TerminalArrow TC x = π₂ · TerminalArrow TC y

        apply TerminalArrowEq.
      Qed.

      Let P : Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x)) (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
        := make_Pullback _ (HF₁ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ pullback_sqr_comm H).

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes
        (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
isaprop
  (∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
   fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g)

HF₂: preserves_terminal F

π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧

  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)

     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))

f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧

P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes
        (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
isaprop
  (∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
   fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))

f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes
        (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
   fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))

f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes
        (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g
φ₁ = φ₂

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧

  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))

f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes
        (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
   x0 · # F π₁ = f × x0 · # F π₂ = g)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧

  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))

f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes
        (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes
        (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
   x0 · # F π₁ = f × x0 · # F π₂ = g)

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes
        (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g
x0: D ⟦ w, F p ⟧
isaprop (x0 · # F π₁ = f × x0 · # F π₂ = g)

          apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes
        (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes
        (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g
pr1 φ₁ · PullbackPr1 P = pr1 φ₂ · PullbackPr1 P
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes
        (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g
pr1 φ₁ · PullbackPr2 P = pr1 φ₂ · PullbackPr2 P

F: C ⟶ D

PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F

x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
FT:= make_Terminal (F TC) (HF₂ TC (pr2 TC)): Terminal D
P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes

           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm

  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g
pr1 φ₁ · PullbackPr1 P = pr1 φ₂ · PullbackPr1 P
 exact (pr12 φ₁ @ !(pr12 φ₂)).
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F

x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))

f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g
pr1 φ₁ · PullbackPr2 P = pr1 φ₂ · PullbackPr2 P
 exact (pr22 φ₁ @ !(pr22 φ₂)).
      Qed.

F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C

x, y: C

π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback

     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧

P:= make_Pullback pullback_sqr_comm
  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y) π₁ π₂
     (PullbackSqrCommutes

           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
f · # F (TerminalArrow TC x) =
g · # F (TerminalArrow TC y)
 abstract
            (use (TerminalArrowEq (T := FT))).
      Defined.

F: C ⟶ D

  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)

     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))

f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧

  (HF₁ x y TC p (TerminalArrow TC x)

           (TerminalArrow TC y))) pullback_sqr_comm
     H): Pullback (# F (TerminalArrow TC x))
  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal_map
· # F π₁ = f

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C

HF₂: preserves_terminal F

  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)

  (# F (TerminalArrow TC y))
preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal_map
· # F π₁ = f

        exact (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 P _ _ _ _).
      Qed.

  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)

    End UMP.

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
isBinProduct D (F x) (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C

HF₂: preserves_terminal F

  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
isBinProduct D (F x) (F y) (F p) (# F π₁) (# F π₂)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
∃! fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
   fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧, fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g

F: C ⟶ D

PBC: Pullbacks C

HF₂: preserves_terminal F

p:= prodC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C p: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C p: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
H:= isPullback_Pullback
  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
     (TerminalArrow TC y)): isPullback
  (PullbackSqrCommutes
     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ fg : D ⟦ w, F p ⟧,
   fg · # F π₁ = f × fg · # F π₂ = g)
 exact (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal_unique f g).

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D

x, y: C

  (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)

     (PBC TC x y (TerminalArrow TC x)
        (TerminalArrow TC y)))
w: D
f: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
g: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
(λ _ : preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal_map
         f g · # F π₁ = f,
 preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal_map f g
 · # F π₂ = g)
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal_pr1 f g)
 exact (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal_pr2 f g).
    Defined.
  End PreservesProd.

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
x, y: C
isBinProduct D (F x) (F y) (F (prodC x y))
  (# F (BinProductPr1 C (prodC x y)))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C (prodC x y)))

    exact (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal_is_prod x y).
  Defined.

  Let eqC : Equalizers C := equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC.

  Section PreservesEq.
    Context {x y : C}
            (f g : x --> y)
            (p : # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f
                 =
                 # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g).

    Let yy : BinProduct C y y := prodC y y.
    Let Δ : y --> prodC y y := diagonalMap' prodC y.
    Let fg : x --> prodC y y := BinProductArrow C yy f g.
    Let P : Pullback Δ fg := PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg.
    Let H : isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
      := isPullback_Pullback P.
    Let e : P --> x := PullbackPr2 P.

    Section UMP.
      Context {w : D}
              (h : w --> F x)
              (q : h · # F f = h · # F g).

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
# F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
PullbackPr1 P · Δ = PullbackPr2 P · fg

        apply PullbackSqrCommutes.
      Qed.

      Let r : # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ = # F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
        := pullback_sqr_comm_eq.

      Let Fyy : BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
        := make_BinProduct
             _ _ _ _ _ _
             (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal
                _ _ _ _ _
                (isBinProduct_BinProduct _ yy)).

      Let FH : isPullback r := HF₁ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ r H.
      Let FP : Pullback (#F Δ) (#F fg) := make_Pullback _ FH.

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
h · # F g · # F Δ = h · # F fg

h · # F g
· # F
    (PullbackArrow
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y)) y (identity y)
       (identity y)
       (TerminalArrowEq
          (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)
          (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)))
· # F
    (PullbackPr1
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y))) =
h
· # F
    (PullbackArrow
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y)) x f g
       (TerminalArrowEq (f · TerminalArrow TC y)
          (g · TerminalArrow TC y)))
· # F
    (PullbackPr1
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y)))

  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
h · # F g
· # F
    (PullbackArrow
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y)) y (identity y)
       (identity y)
       (TerminalArrowEq
          (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)
          (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)))
· # F
    (PullbackPr1
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y))) =
h
· # F
    (PullbackArrow
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y)) x f g
       (TerminalArrowEq (f · TerminalArrow TC y)
          (g · TerminalArrow TC y)))
· # F
    (PullbackPr1
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y)))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
h
· (# F g
   · (# F
        (PullbackArrow
           (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
              (TerminalArrow TC y)) y (identity y)
           (identity y)
           (TerminalArrowEq
              (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)
              (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)))
      · # F
          (PullbackPr1
             (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
                (TerminalArrow TC y))))) =
h
· (# F
     (PullbackArrow
        (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
           (TerminalArrow TC y)) x f g
        (TerminalArrowEq (f · TerminalArrow TC y)
           (g · TerminalArrow TC y)))
   · # F
       (PullbackPr1
          (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
             (TerminalArrow TC y))))

h
· # F
    (g
     · (PullbackArrow
          (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
             (TerminalArrow TC y)) y (identity y)
          (identity y)

· (# F g
   · (# F
        (PullbackArrow

  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r

h
· # F
    (g
     · (PullbackArrow
          (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
             (TerminalArrow TC y)) y (identity y)
          (identity y)

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
h · # F (g · identity y) = h · # F g

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
h · # F g = h · # F g

          apply idpath.
      Qed.

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
isaprop
  (∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
   φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
isaprop
  (∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
   φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
   φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h)

        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
φ₁ = φ₂

F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C

HF₂: preserves_terminal F

p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧

φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
   x0 · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h)

pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
x0: D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧
isaprop (x0 · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h)

          apply homset_property.
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C

x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)

  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)

φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F

eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg

h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg

  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))

  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
pr1 φ₁ · PullbackPr1 FP = pr1 φ₂ · PullbackPr1 FP

prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg

h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)

φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P)

     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
help_mono: pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ

F: C ⟶ D

yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg

h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)

  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
