C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
help_mono: pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ
lem:= maponpaths
  (λ z : D ⟦ w, Fyy ⟧, z · BinProductPr1 D Fyy)
  help_mono: (λ z : D ⟦ w, Fyy ⟧, z · BinProductPr1 D Fyy)
  (pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ) =
(λ z : D ⟦ w, Fyy ⟧, z · BinProductPr1 D Fyy)
  (pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ)
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P)

            
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
help_mono: pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ
lem:= maponpaths
  (λ z : D ⟦ w,
         F
           (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
              (TerminalArrow TC y)) ⟧,
   z
   · # F
       (PullbackPr1
          (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
             (TerminalArrow TC y)))) help_mono: pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P)
· # F
    (PullbackArrow
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y)) y 
       (identity y) (identity y)
       (TerminalArrowEq
          (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)
          (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)))
· # F
    (PullbackPr1
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y))) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P)
· # F
    (PullbackArrow
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y)) y 
       (identity y) (identity y)
       (TerminalArrowEq
          (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)
          (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)))
· # F
    (PullbackPr1
       (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
          (TerminalArrow TC y)))
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P)

            
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
help_mono: pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ
lem: pr1 φ₁
· (# F (PullbackPr1 P)
   · (# F
        (PullbackArrow
           (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
              (TerminalArrow TC y)) y
           (identity y) (identity y)
           (TerminalArrowEq
              (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)
              (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)))
      · # F
          (PullbackPr1
             (PBC TC y y 
                (TerminalArrow TC y)
                (TerminalArrow TC y))))) =
pr1 φ₂
· (# F (PullbackPr1 P)
   · (# F
        (PullbackArrow
           (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
              (TerminalArrow TC y)) y
           (identity y) (identity y)
           (TerminalArrowEq
              (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)
              (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)))
      · # F
          (PullbackPr1
             (PBC TC y y 
                (TerminalArrow TC y)
                (TerminalArrow TC y)))))
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P)

            
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
help_mono: pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ
lem: pr1 φ₁
· # F
    (PullbackPr1 P
     · (PullbackArrow
          (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
             (TerminalArrow TC y)) y
          (identity y) (identity y)
          (TerminalArrowEq
             (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)
             (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y))
        · PullbackPr1
            (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
               (TerminalArrow TC y)))) =
pr1 φ₂
· # F
    (PullbackPr1 P
     · (PullbackArrow
          (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
             (TerminalArrow TC y)) y
          (identity y) (identity y)
          (TerminalArrowEq
             (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y)
             (identity y · TerminalArrow TC y))
        · PullbackPr1
            (PBC TC y y (TerminalArrow TC y)
               (TerminalArrow TC y))))
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P)

            
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
help_mono: pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ
lem: pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P · identity y) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P · identity y)
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P)

            
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D

fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)

  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
help_mono: pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ
lem: pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P)
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P)

            exact lem.

F: C ⟶ D

p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg

q: h · # F f = h · # F g

  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)

  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
pr1 φ₁ · (# F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ) =
pr1 φ₂ · (# F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ)

          
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr1 P · Δ) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr1 P · Δ)

p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =

yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg

e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧

h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g

# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg

  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y

φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
pr1 φ₁ · # F (PullbackPr2 P) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (PullbackPr2 P)

          exact (pr2 φ₁ @ !(pr2 φ₂)).
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h
pr1 φ₁ · PullbackPr2 FP = pr1 φ₂ · PullbackPr2 FP
 exact (pr2 φ₁ @ !(pr2 φ₂)).
      Qed.

F: C ⟶ D

PBC: Pullbacks C

HF₂: preserves_terminal F

x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g

Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧

q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧

p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =

?h · # F Δ = ?k · # F fg

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
 exact h.
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
h · # F g · # F Δ = h · # F fg
 exact preserves_equalizer_from_pullback_terminal_map_eq.
      Defined.

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C

f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
preserves_equalizer_from_pullback_terminal_map
· # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
r:= pullback_sqr_comm_eq: # F (PullbackPr1 P) · # F Δ =
# F (PullbackPr2 P) · # F fg
Fyy:= make_BinProduct D (F y) (F y) 
  (F yy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C yy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C yy))
  (preserves_binproduct_from_pullback_terminal y
     y yy (BinProductPr1 C yy)
     (BinProductPr2 C yy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C yy)): BinProduct D (F y) (F y)
FH:= HF₁ y x (prodC y y) P Δ fg 
  (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P) r H: isPullback r
FP:= make_Pullback r FH: Pullback (# F Δ) (# F fg)
preserves_equalizer_from_pullback_terminal_map
· # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h

        apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 FP).
      Qed.
    End UMP.

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
isEqualizer (# F f) (# F g)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g))) p

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
∃! φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
isaprop
  (∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
   φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h)

p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g

Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧

isaprop
  (∑ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
   φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h)
 exact (preserves_equalizer_from_pullback_terminal_map_unique h).

fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧

q: h · # F f = h · # F g
(λ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
 φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h) 
  ?pr1

p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g

fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg

q: h · # F f = h · # F g
D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧
 exact (preserves_equalizer_from_pullback_terminal_map h q).
        
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
yy:= prodC y y: BinProduct C y y
Δ:= diagonalMap' prodC y: C ⟦ y, prodC y y ⟧
fg:= BinProductArrow C yy f g: C ⟦ x, prodC y y ⟧
P:= PBC (prodC y y) y x Δ fg: Pullback Δ fg
H:= isPullback_Pullback P: isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes P)
e:= PullbackPr2 P: C ⟦ P, x ⟧
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
q: h · # F f = h · # F g
(λ φ : D ⟦ w, F (eqC x y f g) ⟧,
 φ · # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) = h)
  (preserves_equalizer_from_pullback_terminal_map h q)
 exact (preserves_equalizer_from_pullback_terminal_comm h q).
    Defined.
  End PreservesEq.

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
preserves_equalizer F

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F

F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
preserves_chosen_equalizer eqC F

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
TC: Terminal C
PBC: Pullbacks C
HF₁: preserves_pullback F
HF₂: preserves_terminal F
prodC:= BinProductsFromPullbacks PBC TC: BinProducts C
eqC:= equalizers_from_pullbacks_prods PBC prodC: Equalizers C
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: # F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g)) · # F g
isEqualizer (# F f) (# F g)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow (eqC x y f g))) p

    exact (preserves_equalizer_from_pullback_terminal_is_equalizer f g p).
  Defined.
End BinProductEqualizerPreservation.

(** * 4. Preservation of pullbacks via binary products and equalizers *)
Section PullbackPreservation.
  Context {C D : category}
          (PC : BinProducts C)
          (EC : Equalizers C)
          (F : C ⟶ D)
          (HF₁ : preserves_binproduct F)
          (HF₂ : preserves_equalizer F).

  Let PBC : Pullbacks C := Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC.

  Section PreservesPB.
    Context {x y z : C}
            (f : x --> z)
            (g : y --> z).

    Let P : Pullback f g := PBC z x y f g.

    Context (q : # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f
                 =
                 # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g).

    Let xy : BinProduct C x y := PC x y.
    Let π₁ : xy --> x := BinProductPr1 _ xy.
    Let π₂ : xy --> y := BinProductPr2 _ xy.

    Let fp : xy --> z := π₁ · f.
    Let gp : xy --> z := π₂ · g.

    Let E : Equalizer fp gp := EC _ _ fp gp.

    Section UMP.
      Context {w : D}
              (h : w --> F x)
              (k : w --> F y)
              (r : h · # F f = k · # F g).

      
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp

      
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp

        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
# F (EqualizerArrow E · fp) =
# F (EqualizerArrow E · gp)

        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
EqualizerArrow E · fp = EqualizerArrow E · gp

        apply EqualizerEqAr.
      Qed.

      Let path : # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp = # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
        := equalizer_eq_help.

      Let FE : Equalizer (#F fp) (#F gp)
        := make_Equalizer _ _ _ _ (HF₂ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ path (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)).

      Let Fxy : BinProduct _ (F x) (F y)
        := make_BinProduct _ _ _ _ _ _ (HF₁ _ _ _ _ _ (isBinProduct_BinProduct _ xy)).

      
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · # F fp =
BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · # F gp

q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y

π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧

BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · # F (π₂ · g)

BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · (# F π₁ · # F f) =
BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · (# F π₂ · # F g)

q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =

π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧

  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))

C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)

  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · # F π₁ · # F f = ?b
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)

  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
?b = BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · # F π₂ · # F g

PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D

HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧

  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)

C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · # F π₁ = ?y'

          apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ Fxy).
        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
h · # F f = BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · # F π₂ · # F g

f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)

C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · # F π₂ · # F g = k · # F g

        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · # F π₂ = k

        apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ Fxy).
      Qed.

      
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
isaprop
  (∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
   hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
   × hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k)

q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g

π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧

# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)

  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
isaprop
  (∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
   hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
   × hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k)

PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
   hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
   × hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k)

        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
φ₁ = φ₂

PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
   x0 · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
   × x0 · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k)

PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C

x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
   x0 · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
   × x0 · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k)

          
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
x0: D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧
isaprop
  (x0 · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
   × x0 · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k)

          apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
pr1 φ₁ · EqualizerArrow FE =
pr1 φ₂ · EqualizerArrow FE

        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
pr1 φ₁ · # F (EqualizerArrow E)
· # F (BinProductPr1 C xy) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (EqualizerArrow E)
· # F (BinProductPr1 C xy)
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
pr1 φ₁ · # F (EqualizerArrow E)
· # F (BinProductPr2 C xy) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (EqualizerArrow E)
· # F (BinProductPr2 C xy)

        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
pr1 φ₁ · # F (EqualizerArrow E)
· # F (BinProductPr1 C xy) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (EqualizerArrow E)
· # F (BinProductPr1 C xy)

PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
pr1 φ₁
· (# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F (BinProductPr1 C xy)) =
pr1 φ₂
· (# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F (BinProductPr1 C xy))

          
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
pr1 φ₁ · # F (EqualizerArrow E · BinProductPr1 C xy) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (EqualizerArrow E · BinProductPr1 C xy)

          exact (pr12 φ₁ @ !(pr12 φ₂)).
        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧

# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
pr1 φ₁ · # F (EqualizerArrow E)
· # F (BinProductPr2 C xy) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (EqualizerArrow E)
· # F (BinProductPr2 C xy)
 
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
pr1 φ₁
· (# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F (BinProductPr2 C xy)) =
pr1 φ₂
· (# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F (BinProductPr2 C xy))

          
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
pr1 φ₁ · # F (EqualizerArrow E · BinProductPr2 C xy) =
pr1 φ₂ · # F (EqualizerArrow E · BinProductPr2 C xy)

          exact (pr22 φ₁ @ !(pr22 φ₂)).
      Qed.

      
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
D ⟦ w, F P ⟧

C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
?h · # F fp = ?h · # F gp

        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
D ⟦ w, F xy ⟧
 exact (BinProductArrow _ Fxy h k).
        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · # F fp =
BinProductArrow D Fxy h k · # F gp
 exact preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map_eq.
      Defined.

      
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map
· # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h

π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧

    (EqualizerArrow
       (EC (PC x y) z (BinProductPr1 C (PC x y) · f)
          (BinProductPr2 C (PC x y) · g))
     · BinProductPr1 C (PC x y)) = h

π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧

PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧

  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
?b = h

π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧

C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map
· # F
    (EqualizerArrow
       (EC (PC x y) z (BinProductPr1 C (PC x y) · f)
          (BinProductPr2 C (PC x y) · g))) = ?y'

          apply (EqualizerCommutes FE).
        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
BinProductArrow D Fxy h k
· # F (BinProductPr1 C (PC x y)) = h

        apply (BinProductPr1Commutes _ _ _ Fxy).
      Qed.

PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C

HF₁: preserves_binproduct F

f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map
· # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k

C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map
· # F
    (EqualizerArrow
       (EC (PC x y) z (BinProductPr1 C (PC x y) · f)
          (BinProductPr2 C (PC x y) · g))
     · BinProductPr2 C (PC x y)) = k

PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F

x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g

# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧

r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map
· (# F
     (EqualizerArrow
        (EC (PC x y) z (BinProductPr1 C (PC x y) · f)
           (BinProductPr2 C (PC x y) · g)))
   · # F (BinProductPr2 C (PC x y))) = k

PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C

PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧

w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧

FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)

  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map
· # F
    (EqualizerArrow
       (EC (PC x y) z (BinProductPr1 C (PC x y) · f)
          (BinProductPr2 C (PC x y) · g)))
· # F (BinProductPr2 C (PC x y)) = ?b
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
?b = k

PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D

HF₂: preserves_equalizer F

x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g

# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
