  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map
· # F
    (EqualizerArrow
       (EC (PC x y) z (BinProductPr1 C (PC x y) · f)
          (BinProductPr2 C (PC x y) · g)))
· # F (BinProductPr2 C (PC x y)) = ?b

          
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map
· # F
    (EqualizerArrow
       (EC (PC x y) z (BinProductPr1 C (PC x y) · f)
          (BinProductPr2 C (PC x y) · g))) = ?y'

          apply (EqualizerCommutes FE).
        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
path:= equalizer_eq_help: # F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F fp =
# F (EqualizerArrow E) · # F gp
FE:= make_Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
  (# F (EqualizerArrow E)) path
  (HF₂ xy z E fp gp (EqualizerArrow E)
     (EqualizerEqAr E) path
     (isEqualizer_Equalizer E)): Equalizer (# F fp) (# F gp)
Fxy:= make_BinProduct D (F x) (F y) 
  (F xy) (# F (BinProductPr1 C xy))
  (# F (BinProductPr2 C xy))
  (HF₁ x y xy (BinProductPr1 C xy)
     (BinProductPr2 C xy)
     (isBinProduct_BinProduct C xy)): BinProduct D (F x) (F y)
BinProductArrow D Fxy h k
· # F (BinProductPr2 C (PC x y)) = k

        apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _ Fxy).
      Qed.
    End UMP.

    
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
isPullback q

    
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
isPullback q

      
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
∃! hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k

      
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
   hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
   × hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k)

HF₁: preserves_binproduct F

x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k

      
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,
   hk · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
   × hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k)
 exact (preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_unique h k).

∑ hk : D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧,

× hk · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k
 
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
?pr1 · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
(λ _ : ?pr1 · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h,
 ?pr1 · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k) ?pr10

        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
D ⟦ w, F (PBC z x y f g) ⟧
 exact (preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map h k r).
        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map h k r
· # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h
 exact (preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_pr1 h k r).
        
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
P:= PBC z x y f g: Pullback f g
q: # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F f =
# F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) · # F g
xy:= PC x y: BinProduct C x y
π₁:= BinProductPr1 C xy: C ⟦ xy, x ⟧
π₂:= BinProductPr2 C xy: C ⟦ xy, y ⟧
fp:= π₁ · f: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
gp:= π₂ · g: C ⟦ xy, z ⟧
E:= EC xy z fp gp: Equalizer fp gp
w: D
h: D ⟦ w, F x ⟧
k: D ⟦ w, F y ⟧
r: h · # F f = k · # F g
(λ _ : preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map
         h k r · # F (PullbackPr1 (PBC z x y f g)) = h,
 preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_map h k
   r · # F (PullbackPr2 (PBC z x y f g)) = k)
  (preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_pr1 h
     k r)
 exact (preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_pr2 h k r).
    Defined.
  End PreservesPB.

  
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
preserves_pullback F

  
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
preserves_pullback F

    
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
preserves_chosen_pullback PBC F

    
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
EC: Equalizers C
F: C ⟶ D
HF₁: preserves_binproduct F
HF₂: preserves_equalizer F
PBC:= Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts C PC EC: Pullbacks C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
isPullback
  (preserves_chosen_pullback_subproof C D PBC F x y z
     f g)

    apply (preserves_pullback_from_binproduct_equalizer_is_pb f g).
  Defined.
End PullbackPreservation.
